welcome.text: Hi! I'm Gonka Bot, an AI assistant powered by Kimi K2.6 on the Gonka decentralized network. Just send me a message to start chatting.
help.text:
Available commands:
/start — restart the bot
/help — show this message
/new — clear the current conversation and start fresh
/persona — switch persona
/voice — toggle voice replies
rate_limit.text: Daily limit reached ({current}/{limit}). Try again in ~{hours}h.
rate_limit.voice: Voice limit reached. Try again in ~{hours}h.
error.message_too_long: Your message is too long (max {limit} characters).
error.service_unavailable: Service is overloaded right now. Please try again in a minute.
error.internal: Something went wrong on my side. Try again or run /new.
error.voice_failed: Couldn't transcribe that voice message. Try again, or send text.
new_conversation.confirmed: Started a new conversation. Previous context cleared.
voice.enabled: Voice replies enabled. I'll send you both text and audio.
voice.disabled: Voice replies disabled. I'll send text only.
persona.selected: Now I'm {name}. Starting a fresh conversation.
persona.default.name: Assistant
persona.analyst.name: Analyst
persona.coder.name: Coder
persona.therapist.name: Listener
persona.translator.name: Translator
persona.editor.name: Editor
persona.researcher.name: Researcher
persona.teacher.name: Teacher
persona.chef.name: Chef
persona.writer.name: Writer
